arts.ttl: Feyenoord amped up and ready for Bayern Munich showdown in Champions League
arts.sum: Feyenoord manager Brian Priske is rallying his troops to be ready for battle and bring tenacity to the pitch when Bayern Munich visits on Wednesday for a Champions League tilt. Tomorrow is a great chance for that,” said Giménez (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Ex-Bayern Munich player Lothar Matthäus: Borussia Dortmund should hire Joachim Löw
arts.sum: “If Jogi Löw were standing on the sidelines – it was similar back then with Franz Beckenbauer at Bayern,” Matthäus began (as captured by Sky Sports Germany journos Kerry Hau and Florian Plettenberg | @Plettigoal ). Bayern Munich is in the midst of a number of important contract situation, so let’s talk about them on the Bavarian Podcast Works Show!

arts.ttl: Feyenoord remain in race to sign Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei
arts.sum: According to Fabrizio Romano, Feyenoord are still showing concrete interest in Chelsea youngster Cesare Casadei. The 22-year-old is free to leave Stamford Bridge this month as long as Chelsea’s requirements…

arts.ttl: Opinion: Tom Bischof is as close to the perfect midfield signing as can be for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: On one hand, signing a talented young German midfielder on a “free” transfer (sign-on fees notwithstanding) seems like a brilliant piece of business, but on the other hand there is a suspicion that this is all there is to the signing. Everything Bischof does on the ball facilitates smooth and quick possession play, which helps disrupt the opposition’s press and allows his team to keep the ball.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Cesare Casadei subject of 'fresh formal bid' from new Serie A club, amid reports of Torino interest
arts.sum: Lazio are reportedly in the process of submitting a formal bid for Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei, amid interest from Torino and an unnamed Premier League club.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Feyenoord vs. Bayern Munich (Champions League)
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will be looking to climb up the Champions League table when it travels to the Netherlands to take on Feyenoord. On paper, Bayern Munich is a very heavy favorite, but Feyenoord has proven to be a tough out in the UCL this season despite its status in 18th place of the Champions League table.

arts.ttl: Midweek Warm-up: Sans Erling Haaland, is RB Leipzig’s Benjamin Šeško Bayern Munich’s best option for a post-Harry Kane plan?; Champions League predictions; Checking out Badflower; and MORE!
arts.sum: Yup, RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Šeško has everything that Bayern Munich likes in a center-forward. In the initial plan, Bayern Munich was supposed to get Bayer Leverkusen ace Florian Wirtz this summer (2025) and mount its next financial offensive at Haaland in 2026 — where Harry Kane would presumably be ready to head back to England.

arts.ttl: Feyenoord vs. Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, injuries, how to watch & more!
arts.sum: Feyenoord vs Bayern | Predicted lineups [ @kicker ] pic.twitter.com/GNVnobBhIb Bayern Munich has rattled off three straight wins to kick off the new year.

arts.ttl: RC Lens tires of waiting for Bayern Munich’s Daniel Peretz, moves on
arts.sum: RC Lens have moved on from Daniel Peretz and signed Mathew Ryan instead, after the Bayern goalkeeper rejected a move pic.twitter.com/ZY3ZmIBRYe Peretz’s reluctance pushed RC Lens into signing AS Roma goalkeeper Mathew Ryan.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich shocked at Daniel Peretz’ RC Lens rejection
arts.sum: It’s known that Bayern Munich wish to loan Daniel Peretz out before the end of the month, but the Israeli goalkeeper has rejected a move to French side RC Lens.…
